subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! Thou art in Kurdistan, and Aqa Mirza Habibullah is in Turkistan, and this servant is in Syria [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی شما در کردستانی و آقا میرزا حبیب الله در ترکستان و این عبد در سورستان
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
